{{Quote|The 908th stopped being one of 'our own' when they decided to go rogue and join Fel.|[[Gil Cassel]]|<ref name="Legacy 4" />}}
The '''908th Stormtrooper Division''' was a [[unit]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]] stationed in a fortress on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jared Cassel]], a [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]-born [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]].<ref name="Legacy 4" /> By [[137 ABY]], the 908th had defected from the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empire]] to join the [[Empire-in-exile]] and were set to arrive on Bastion with [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] but were stranded when their transport was destroyed.<ref name="Legacy 3" />

The [[407th Stormtrooper Division]], under the command of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maleval]], was sent in to [[Battle of Borosk (137 ABY)|destroy]] them after [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Morlish Veed]] and the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]] decided to preserve their base from aerial bombardment. Though they put up a ferocious resistance, the 908th was wiped out to the last man.<ref name="Legacy 4" />
